chapter_title.en: Reward of saying Bismillaah before meals

text: حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحُسَیْنِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ یَحْیَی الْخَزَّازِ عَنْ غِیَاثِ بْنِ إِبْرَاهِیمَ الدَّارِمِیِّ عَنْ جَعْفَرٍ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ آبَائِهِ عَنْ أَمِیرِ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ ع قَالَ: مَنْ ذَکَرَ اسْمَ اللَّهِ عَلَی طَعَامٍ لَمْ یُسْأَلْ عَنْ ذَلِکَ الطَّعَامِ أَبَداً.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Muhammad b. al-Hussain from Muhammad b. Yahya al-Khazaz from Ghiyath b. Ibrahim al-Darrami from Ja’far from his father from his forefathers from Ameer al-Mumineen (a.s.) who said: “One who utters the name of Allah before meals will never be questioned about that bounty of Allah.”
